empty.title: No images yet
empty.description: Be the first to share something amazing with the community. Start by uploading your favorite images.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue to Slink
login.demo_mode_description: Try the application with the test credentials
login.demo_mode_footer: Automatically fills credentials and signs you in
login.need_account_description: Create one to start sharing images

signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Join Slink to start sharing your images
signup.already_have_account_description: Sign in to access your images

awaiting_approval.under_review: Your account is currently under review
awaiting_approval.what_happens_next_description: Your account is being reviewed and will be activated once approved. Please check back later for updates on your account status.
awaiting_approval.need_help_description: Contact the administrator if you have questions about your account or the review process.
awaiting_approval.account_reference_description: Provide this ID when contacting the administrator
awaiting_approval.approved_and_activated: Your account has been approved and activated
awaiting_approval.all_features_unlocked_description: Upload, share, and manage your content with full access to all platform features. Start creating and sharing your content.
awaiting_approval.ready_to_get_started_description: Sign in to your account to begin using all the platform features or explore the public gallery to see what others are sharing.
awaiting_approval.ready_to_continue_description: Sign in to access all platform features

search.title: No images found
search.description_prefix: No images match your search for
search.description_suffix: Try a different search term or browse all images.

navbar.upload_description: Share your media with others by uploading them and organizing them into collections.
navbar.toggle_theme_description: Switch between light and dark mode.

api_errors.COLLECTION_NAME_TOO_LONG: Collection name cannot exceed maximum length
api_errors.COLLECTION_DESCRIPTION_TOO_LONG: Collection description cannot exceed maximum length
api_errors.COMMENT_EDIT_OWN_ONLY: You can only edit your own comments
api_errors.COMMENT_DELETE_NOT_ALLOWED: You can only delete your own comments or comments on your images
api_errors.BOOKMARKERS_VIEW_OWN_IMAGE_ONLY: You can only view bookmarkers for your own images
api_errors.DATE_RANGE_INVALID: Start date must be before end date
api_errors.REQUEST_INVALID_FORM_DATA: Request payload contains invalid form data
api_errors.DISPLAY_NAME_TOO_SHORT: Display name must be at least 3 characters long
api_errors.DISPLAY_NAME_TOO_LONG: Display name must be at most 30 characters long
api_errors.USERNAME_TOO_SHORT: Username must be at least 3 characters long
api_errors.USERNAME_TOO_LONG: Username must be at most 30 characters long
api_errors.AUTH_LOGIN_REQUIRED_FOR_PASSWORD_CHANGE: You must be logged in to change your password
api_errors.AUTH_SSO_PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE: SSO provider is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
api_errors.API_KEY_NOT_OWNED: API key does not belong to user
api_errors.API_KEY_NOT_FOUND_OR_EXPIRED: API key not found or expired
api_errors.IMAGE_DIMENSIONS_POSITIVE_REQUIRED: Width and height must be positive integers
api_errors.IMAGE_DIMENSIONS_AT_LEAST_ONE_REQUIRED: At least one dimension (width or height) must be specified
api_errors.IMAGE_DIMENSIONS_ORIGINAL_REQUIRED_FOR_R: Original dimensions are required when only one target dimension is specified
api_errors.IMAGE_FRAME_COUNT_MIN_1: Frame count must be at least 1
api_errors.IMAGE_WIDTH_POSITIVE_REQUIRED: Width must be a positive integer when provided
api_errors.IMAGE_HEIGHT_POSITIVE_REQUIRED: Height must be a positive integer when provided
api_errors.TAG_NAME_INVALID_CHARS: Tag name can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
api_errors.TAG_MOVE_TO_DESCENDANT_FORBIDDEN: Cannot move a tag to one of its descendants
api_errors.TAG_MOVE_TO_SELF_FORBIDDEN: Cannot move a tag to itself
api_errors.NOTIFICATION_MARK_READ_OWN_ONLY: You can only mark your own notifications as read
api_errors.SETTINGS_PASSWORD_LENGTH_TOO_SHORT: Password length cannot be less than 3
api_errors.SETTINGS_PASSWORD_LENGTH_TOO_LONG: Password length cannot be greater than 64
api_errors.SETTINGS_IMAGE_MAX_SIZE_TOO_SMALL: Max size cannot be less than 0
api_errors.SETTINGS_IMAGE_MAX_SIZE_TOO_LARGE: Max size cannot be greater than 1000
